comments.author: @TruePlanetOffical
comments.text: UTAH: The REAL American Southwest Most People Will Never See | 4K Travel Documentary

comments.author: @NgocAnh-metub
comments.text: Hi team, I have a project I'd like to collaborate on with your channel. Could you please provide your contact information so we can communicate more easily? Thank you!

replies.author: @TruePlanetOffical
replies.text:
Hey, really appreciate you thinking of us for a collab! At the moment we’re fully booked with our own projects and not taking on external partnerships. Wishing you the best with it though.
If you dig the travel docs, hit subscribe, drop a like, and share it with a friend who loves exploring!

comments.author: @mysteryvault-h2o
comments.text: I've been lucky enough to visit Southern Utah several times, and every trip reminds me why I keep coming back. The scenery is just on another level. Pictures don't even come close to doing it justice.

replies.author: @TruePlanetOffical
replies.text:
Southern Utah just hits different, doesn’t it? Glad you’ve gotten to soak it in multiple times — those red rocks and big skies never get old. Pictures really can’t capture that feeling.
If these wild places speak to you too, hit subscribe, drop a like, and share it with a fellow desert lover!

replies.author: @joemanpjg
replies.text: so so true....never enough time out here..so many incredible sites to see..
